param.value: "Validar carrito de compra con diferentes productos en un solo pase"

exception.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element located by: AppiumBy.accessibilityId: Tap to add product to cart (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)

param.value: "Realizar la compra completa de un producto paso a paso"
